approach: The challenge requires a three-step workflow: 1. POST to /api/prism/origin to get a runId, seed, and salt. 2. Calculate a SHA-256 hash of the concatenated seed, salt, and label (from the first request) to generate a proof, then PUT to /api/prism/bridge with the runId and proof. 3. PATCH to /api/prism/complete with the runId and the bridgeTicket received from the second step.
evidenceUsed: exact-copy relations for runId and ticket propagation
uncertainties: The exact string concatenation order for the hash input is inferred from the relation metadata as seed:salt:label.
